calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 29, 2023 is admitted to probate. Robert J. Bugatto is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is to be filed one week prior to the hearing date/ If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.
